channel.title: Oval Updates
channel.description: Most recent changes with links to updates.

item.title: Version 1.1.0
item.description:
What's New in v1.1.0

  • Voice mode floating window — ChatGPT-style compact window instead of fullscreen
  • On-device STT/TTS model selection — choose from multiple Whisper and Piper models in Settings
  • Better TTS for chat — play button uses on-device Piper voice instead of macOS system voice
  • Instant TTS stop — stops mid-sentence when you hit stop
  • Auto-update support — Sparkle integration for seamless updates
